title: reorder updates, change the order of the updates and files
excerpt: Please add a feature, where it is possible to manually change the order of the updates and the files, for example by dragging them around. Thank you.

posts.author: Justyna (Justyna )
posts.cookedHtml: Please add a feature, where it is possible to manually change the order of the updates and the files, for example by dragging them around. Thank you.
